stories.title: Astros Throw MLB's First No-Hitter Since 2024 — Imai, Okert, Santa Combine for 9-0 Win (Tier 1)
stories.posting_window: 9:00 AM ET (no-hitter announcement), 9:30 AM ET (Santa debut angle)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The Astros just threw the first no-hitter in MLB since September 2024.

Tatsuya Imai (6 IP), Steven Okert (1 IP), Alimber Santa (2 IP) combined for a 9-0 win vs Texas.

Imai walked 3 of his first 4 batters. The no-no happened anyway. ⚾️

#LetsGoAstros #MLB
x_posts.posting_time: 9:00 AM ET (no-hitter announcement), 9:30 AM ET (Santa debut angle)

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Alimber Santa made his MLB debut Monday.

He also threw 2 perfect innings to help complete a no-hitter.

He's the first pitcher since 1900 to appear in a no-hitter on his debut.

The Astros beat Texas 9-0. ⚾️

#LetsGoAstros #MLB
x_posts.posting_time: 9:00 AM ET (no-hitter announcement), 9:30 AM ET (Santa debut angle)

facebook.posting_time: 9:00 AM ET (no-hitter announcement), 9:30 AM ET (Santa debut angle)

research.facts:
Astros Combined No-Hitter
**Classification:** NEW STORY
**Freshness:** Occurred Monday May 25. Not covered in yesterday's pipeline.
**Key Facts (MEDIUM-HIGH confidence):**
- Pitchers: Tatsuya Imai (6 IP), Steven Okert (1 IP), Alimber Santa (2 IP) — HIGH (AP wire, Washington Post, Baltimore Sun)
- Final score: Houston 9, Texas 0 — HIGH (multiple sources)
- Date: Monday, May 25, 2026 — HIGH (multiple sources)
- Venue: Globe Life Park, Arlington, Texas — MEDIUM (implied; needs confirmation)
- Imai performance: walked 3 of 4 first batters, then settled; 97 pitches — HIGH (lancasteronline.com, foxsports)
- Imai: two double plays, eight groundball outs — MEDIUM (foxsports.com)
- Alimber Santa: 2 IP perfect (final 6 batters retired) — HIGH (mlb.com/news)
- Santa is "first pitcher since 1900 to appear in a no-hitter on his big-league debut" — MEDIUM (one source; needs second source per two-source rule — research used SI FastBall and ML.com coverage)
- Updated: "first pitcher since 1900" confirmed at prismnews.com and si.com — HIGH
- Last MLB no-hitter: Sept. 4, 2024 (Cubs — Shota Imanaga, Nate Pearson, Porter Hodge vs. Pittsburgh) — HIGH (mlb.com)
- Astros franchise no-hitter count: 17th regular-season no-hitter — HIGH (mlb.com)
- Imai contract: $54M/3-year deal signed January 2026 — HIGH (lancasteronline.com)
- Imai background: 3x All-Star in Japan, 10-5 record, 1.92 ERA for Seibu Lions last season — HIGH (lancasteronline.com)
**Sources:**
- mlb.com/news/astros-throw-combined-no-hitter-against-rangers

- baltimoresun.com/2026/05/25/astros-starter-tatsuya-imai
- foxsports.com/stories/mlb/houston-astros-toss-combined-no-hitter

stories.title: Blue Jays Rotation in Crisis — Cease Joins Four Others on IL as Guerrero Jr. Day-to-Day (Tier 1)
stories.posting_window: 10:30 AM ET (Cease IL news), 11:00 AM ET (full rotation crisis angle)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
The Blue Jays just placed Dylan Cease on the 15-day IL.

Cease: 3-3, 3.05 ERA, MLB-leading 92 Ks. $210M contract. Now hurt.

He joins Berríos, Scherzer, Bieber and Ponce on the IL.

Five starters down. Vlad Jr. day-to-day too. ⚾️

#BlueJays #MLB
x_posts.posting_time: 10:30 AM ET (Cease IL news), 11:00 AM ET (full rotation crisis angle)

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
The 2026 Blue Jays have:

❌ Dylan Cease on IL (hamstring)
❌ José Berríos on IL
❌ Max Scherzer on IL
❌ Shane Bieber on IL
❌ Cody Ponce on IL

Their ace has a $210M deal. He's been here 11 starts.

This rotation was supposed to be elite. ⚾️

#BlueJays #MLB
x_posts.posting_time: 10:30 AM ET (Cease IL news), 11:00 AM ET (full rotation crisis angle)

stories.title: Giants Begin Exploring Trade Deadline Fire Sale After League-Worst Run Differential (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The Giants have MLB's worst run differential (-42). They traded their Gold Glove catcher.

Now they're shopping Robbie Ray, Tyler Mahle, and Harrison Bader.

The $200M roster that wasn't supposed to fail is already falling apart.

Fire sale incoming. ⚾️

#SFGiants #MLB

article.headline: The Giants Have MLB's Worst Run Differential. The Trade Deadline Teardown Has Begun.

research.facts:
Giants Trade Deadline Fire Sale
**Classification:** NEW STORY
**Freshness:** Trade deadline rumors actively developing; Bailey trade already made.
**Key Facts:**
- Giants record: 16-24 start (one source says 17-24 through 41 games) — MEDIUM (slight discrepancy; use "worst record in NL" framing, avoid specific W-L)
- Run differential: -42 (worst in MLB through ~41 games) — MEDIUM (sportsnaut.com/mlbtraderumors reference)
- Patrick Bailey traded to Cleveland Guardians — HIGH (multiple trade rumor sources)
- Likeliest trade chips: Robbie Ray (SP), Tyler Mahle (SP), Harrison Bader (OF) — MEDIUM (foxsports.com trade tracker, USA Today reference via Yahoo Sports)
- Major contracts struggling but unlikely traded: Jung Hoo Lee ($85M), Willy Adames ($161M), Rafael Devers ($226M), Matt Chapman ($125M) — MEDIUM (foxsports.com)
- Potential Logan Webb offers: if team continues to struggle — LOW (single source, speculative)
**Note:** Devers contract figure ($226M) is HIGH risk for accuracy — total contract value should be verified. Use cautiously with medium confidence.
**Sources:**
- foxsports.com/stories/mlb/2026-mlb-trade-deadline-rumors
- msn.com/en-us/sports/mlb/2026-mlb-trade-deadline-rumors-tracker

stories.title: Dodgers Bullpen Sets Franchise Scoreless Record at 38 Innings (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The LA Dodgers have lost Glasnow, Snell, Dreyer, AND Diaz.

Their bullpen responded by pitching 38 consecutive scoreless innings — a franchise record.

Kyle Hurt. 14 appearances. 0 runs allowed. 0.60 ERA.

The best bullpen story in baseball right now. ⚾️

#Dodgers #MLB

article.headline: 38 Scoreless Innings and Counting: The Dodgers' Bullpen Is Setting Franchise Records While Everyone Else Is Hurt

research.facts:
Dodgers Bullpen Franchise Record 38 Scoreless Innings
**Classification:** NEW STORY
**Freshness:** Streak confirmed via multiple sources May 25, 2026.
**Key Facts:**
- Dodger bullpen scoreless streak: 38 consecutive innings — HIGH (dodgersnation.com, truebluela.com, Yahoo Sports)
- Franchise record in the modern era — HIGH (truebluela.com)
- Longest since Cleveland's 38.2 scoreless innings in 2017 — MEDIUM (dodgersnation.com)
- Kyle Hurt: 0.60 ERA on year, 14 appearances, 0 runs allowed — HIGH (truebluela.com)
- Tanner Scott: scoreless since April 24 — MEDIUM (truebluela.com)
- 12 different pitchers contributed — MEDIUM (truebluela.com)
- Missing: Tyler Glasnow, Blake Snell, Jack Dreyer, Edwin Diaz (IL with loose body in elbow) — MEDIUM (truebluela.com)
- Edwin Diaz signed as All-Star closer, landed on IL — HIGH (dodgersnation.com)
**Sources:**

No. 1 Braves (36-18, 9-game lead)

Tampa was projected to finish last in the AL East.

They're No. 2 in all of baseball. ⚾️

#MLB #RaysUp
